parameters.jsCode:
const { page_slug, page_type, service, location } = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { page_slug: page_slug || '', page_type: page_type || 'service', service: service || 'lawn care', location: location || 'Madison WI' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 300, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Generate an SEO meta title and meta description for a {{ $json.page_type }} page. Business: TotalGuard Yard Care, Madison WI. Service: {{ $json.service }}. Location context: {{ $json.location }}. Requirements: Title under 60 chars, description 120-155 chars, include primary keyword naturally, local intent, action-oriented. Return JSON only: { \"title\": \"...\", \"description\": \"...\" }" }] }
